title: rhododendron sanguineum var. didymum
intro: Rhododendron sanguineum var. didymum, also known as the Ironwood or Alpine Rose, is a variety of flowering shrub that belongs to the rhododendron family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include astringent and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rhododendron sanguineum var. didymum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
